data.message: Genesis Block - CloudTwin AI Compliance Audit Chain

encryption_at_rest.message: S3 Encryption at Rest - Compliant [ISO 27001 A.10.1.1 | NIST 800-53 SC-28]

encryption_in_transit.message: S3 Encryption in Transit - Non-compliant [ISO 27001 A.14.1.2 | NIST 800-53 SC-8]
encryption_in_transit.remediation: [S3-002] Add bucket policy denying requests without aws:SecureTransport condition

versioning.message: S3 Versioning Enabled - Non-compliant [ISO 27001 A.12.3.1 | NIST 800-53 CP-9]
versioning.remediation: [S3-003] Enable bucket versioning to protect against accidental deletion and overwrites

public_access_block.message: S3 Public Access Block - Compliant [ISO 27001 A.9.4.1 | NIST 800-53 AC-3]

access_logging.message: S3 Access Logging - Non-compliant [ISO 27001 A.12.4.1 | NIST 800-53 AU-2]
access_logging.remediation: [S3-005] Enable server access logging and direct logs to a dedicated logging bucket

mfa_delete.message: S3 MFA Delete - Non-compliant [ISO 27001 A.9.4.2 | NIST 800-53 IA-2]
mfa_delete.remediation: [S3-006] Enable MFA Delete on the bucket versioning configuration

lifecycle_policy.message: S3 Lifecycle Policy - Non-compliant [ISO 27001 A.8.3.2 | NIST 800-53 MP-6]
lifecycle_policy.remediation: [S3-007] Configure lifecycle rules for transitioning or expiring objects
